title: Stablecoin Rail Register
description: An open, versioned, machine-readable register of how jurisdictions regulate stablecoin payment rails across a fifteen-dimension framework derived from an eight-constraint model, with two doctrinal spines (the permitted-activity / yield boundary and securities classification) and a corridor-level interoperability layer. Focus jurisdictions: United States, Hong Kong, European Union, United Kingdom, Singapore, and Mainland China; doctrinal anchor: United States (CLARITY Act Section 404 / GENIUS Act). Each record is one sourced (jurisdiction x instrument x dimension) regulatory fact, validated against a published JSON Schema. Data is licensed CC-BY-4.0; tooling is licensed Apache-2.0.
